title: tetradenia japonica
intro: Tetradenia japonica, also known as Japanese tetradenia or Japanese forest mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tetradenia japonica include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Tetradenia japonica are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
